tabs.label: Static Websites
tabs.intro: Brand-new websites built from scratch. Prices derived from component costs — lower end when client supplies a design file, upper end when designed from scratch.
tabs.introEs: Sitios web construidos desde cero. Precios derivados de componentes — rango inferior cuando el cliente provee un archivo de diseño, rango superior cuando se diseña desde cero.

rows.name: Landing page
rows.includes: 1 page: hero, 3 content sections, contact form, nav + footer, basic SEO, GA4, favicon
rows.includesEs: 1 página: hero, 3 secciones, formulario de contacto, nav + footer, SEO básico, GA4, favicon

rows.name: Brochure site
rows.includes: 3–5 pages, hero + sections, responsive nav + footer, contact form, basic SEO, GA4, performance optimization
rows.includesEs: 3–5 páginas, hero + secciones, nav + footer responsivo, formulario de contacto, SEO básico, GA4, optimización de rendimiento

rows.name: Portfolio site
rows.includes: 5–8 pages, gallery grid with lightbox, about + services + contact pages, contact form, SEO, GA4, performance optimization
rows.includesEs: 5–8 páginas, galería con lightbox, páginas about + servicios + contacto, formulario, SEO, GA4, optimización de rendimiento

rows.name: Restaurant / Local
rows.includes: 3–5 pages (menu, hours, about, contact), hero, interactive map, WhatsApp/phone CTA, contact form, on-page SEO + local schema, GA4
rows.includesEs: 3–5 páginas (menú, horarios, about, contacto), hero, mapa interactivo, botón WhatsApp, formulario de contacto, SEO + schema local, GA4

rows.name: Static blog setup
rows.includes: Home + blog listing page, reusable post template, up to 10 posts formatted, on-page SEO + sitemap, GA4
rows.includesEs: Inicio + listado de blog, plantilla de post reutilizable, hasta 10 posts maquetados, SEO en página + sitemap, GA4

tabs.label: Redesign & Updates
tabs.intro: Updates and improvements for existing websites. Hourly estimates guide pricing — billed as a flat range per project.
tabs.introEs: Mejoras para sitios web existentes. Los estimados en horas orientan el precio — se cobra como rango fijo por proyecto.

rows.name: Visual redesign
rows.includes: New styles, layout, and component rebuild. No content rewriting.
rows.includesEs: Nuevos estilos, layout y reconstrucción de componentes. Sin reescritura de contenido.

rows.name: Responsive / mobile fix
rows.includes: Media queries, flex/grid corrections, viewport meta fix.
rows.includesEs: Media queries, correcciones flex/grid, corrección de viewport meta.

rows.name: Content update
rows.includes: Copy replacement, image swap, page additions.
rows.includesEs: Reemplazo de textos, cambio de imágenes, adición de páginas.

rows.name: Bug fixes
rows.includes: Layout issues, broken links, JS errors. Scoped per issue; complex debugging at $40/hr.
rows.includesEs: Problemas de layout, links rotos, errores JS. Se cotiza por incidencia; depuración compleja a $40/hr.

rows.name: Performance re-optimization
rows.includes: Audit + image compression + caching headers + code minification.
rows.includesEs: Auditoría + compresión de imágenes + headers de caché + minificación de código.

rows.name: Add new page to existing site
rows.includes: Matches existing design system. Animations billed separately.
rows.includesEs: Respeta el sistema de diseño existente. Animaciones se cotizan aparte.

tabs.label: SEO & Performance
tabs.intro: Improve your site's visibility, speed, and accessibility.
tabs.introEs: Mejora la visibilidad, velocidad y accesibilidad de tu sitio.

rows.name: Basic on-page SEO
rows.includes: Meta tags, Open Graph, alt text, robots.txt, sitemap.xml.
rows.includesEs: Meta tags, Open Graph, alt text, robots.txt, sitemap.xml.

rows.name: Performance optimization
rows.includes: Image compression, lazy load, caching headers, code minification.
rows.includesEs: Compresión de imágenes, lazy load, headers de caché, minificación de código.

rows.name: Technical SEO audit
rows.includes: Issues list + fix recommendations report.
rows.includesEs: Lista de problemas + reporte de recomendaciones.

rows.name: WCAG 2.1 AA audit + fixes
rows.includes: Keyboard navigation, color contrast, ARIA labels.
rows.includesEs: Navegación con teclado, contraste de color, etiquetas ARIA.

rows.name: Schema markup (JSON-LD)
rows.includes: Local Business, FAQPage, etc.
rows.includesEs: Local Business, FAQPage, etc.

tabs.label: Add-ons & Extras
tabs.intro: Enhance any plan with these extras. Can be added to any package or quoted standalone.
tabs.introEs: Complementa cualquier plan con estas opciones. Se pueden agregar a cualquier paquete o cotizar por separado.

rows.name: Multilingual setup (i18n)
rows.includes: JS-based language switcher, 2–3 languages, no CMS required.
rows.includesEs: Selector de idioma en JS, 2–3 idiomas, sin CMS requerido.

rows.name: Contact form
rows.includes: Formspree / EmailJS integration, no backend required.
rows.includesEs: Integración con Formspree / EmailJS, sin backend.

rows.name: Google Analytics GA4
rows.includes: GA4 setup + events and conversion tracking.
rows.includesEs: Configuración de GA4 + seguimiento de eventos y conversiones.

rows.name: Interactive map embed
rows.includes: Leaflet or Google Maps embed.
rows.includesEs: Integración con Leaflet o Google Maps.

rows.name: WhatsApp floating button
rows.includes: Floating button with custom message preset.
rows.includesEs: Botón flotante con mensaje personalizado.

rows.name: Social media icon links
rows.includes: Linked icons in header and/or footer.
rows.includesEs: Iconos con enlace en header y/o footer.

rows.name: Dark / light mode toggle
rows.includes: CSS variables + localStorage preference saving.
rows.includesEs: Variables CSS + preferencia guardada en localStorage.

rows.name: Image slider / carousel
rows.includes: Swiper.js or CSS-only implementation.
rows.includesEs: Implementación con Swiper.js o solo CSS.

rows.name: Accordion / FAQ section
rows.includes: CSS/JS toggle, accessible markup.
rows.includesEs: Alternancia CSS/JS, marcado accesible.

rows.name: Cookie consent banner
rows.includes: GDPR-compliant, no external CMP required.
rows.includesEs: Cumple GDPR, sin necesidad de CMP externo.

rows.name: Favicon + social preview images
rows.includes: Multi-size favicon, Open Graph image.
rows.includesEs: Favicon en múltiples tamaños, imagen Open Graph.

rows.name: 404 / error page
rows.includes: On-brand design, links back to key pages.
rows.includesEs: Diseño alineado a la marca, enlaza a páginas clave.

rows.name: Scroll-to-top button
rows.includes: Smooth scroll with fade-in animation.
rows.includesEs: Scroll suave con animación de aparición.

rows.name: Deployment & domain setup
rows.includes: Netlify / Vercel / cPanel setup. DNS configuration not included.
rows.includesEs: Configuración en Netlify / Vercel / cPanel. Configuración de DNS no incluida.

rows.name: Static blog (add-on)
rows.includes: Add a pre-rendered blog to an existing site, up to 10 posts, basic SEO structure.
rows.includesEs: Agrega un blog pre-renderizado a un sitio existente, hasta 10 posts, estructura SEO básica.
